wiki.summary: This song paints the picture of a toxic, one-sided relationship where Lucy initially believes he is loved and cared for, only to realize he was never truly valued. The song focuses on the reflective moments that Lucy goes through while coming to terms with the fate of the relationship. This song is also a direct interpolation of Lucy’s song ru relation, even reusing a lyric and cadences seen in ru relation. Read more on Last.fm.
